profiles.short_bio: Chris Dyer is a keynote speaker, 4x bestselling author, and former 5x Inc. 5000 CEO known for leadership and culture keynotes built around the Moments That Matter methodology and 7 Pillars of Amazing Culture framework. He is a strong fit for event buyers seeking practical perspectives on executive alignment, employee engagement, and measurable culture outcomes.
profiles.long_bio: Chris Dyer is an American keynote speaker focused on leadership and organizational culture. As a 4x bestselling author and former 5x Inc. 5000 CEO, Chris Dyer brings direct executive experience to conversations about performance, growth, and team culture. Chris Dyer’s work is centered on the Moments That Matter methodology and the 7 Pillars of Amazing Culture framework. These ideas give event planners a clear way to frame leadership content around culture, execution, and the everyday decisions that shape employee experience. Chris Dyer has delivered more than 300 keynotes across 20+ countries, giving him broad exposure to corporate audiences and event settings. His client history includes NASA, Johnson & Johnson, Southwest Airlines, IKEA, General Motors, Intuit, and MetLife, which reflects a strong fit for organizations looking for a business-focused speaker with cross-industry relevance. Chris Dyer is well suited to leadership meetings, offsites, culture events, and employee programs where practical takeaways matter. His profile combines executive credibility, global speaking experience, and a clear focus on organizational culture, making him a compelling option for planners who want a keynote that supports measurable leadership outcomes.
